metadata.description: Redis Technical Support Engineer tooling for Claude Code. Umbrella marketplace — current plugins: tse-jira (Bug/RCA/score). Future plugins: RCA tooling, support-package analyzers, Grafana helpers, etc.

plugins.name: tse-jira
plugins.description: Create Redis Bug Jiras from Zendesk PDFs, multi-cluster RCA Jiras from Zendesk+Jira PDFs, and compute impact scores. Three slash commands: /tse-jira:bug, /tse-jira:rca, /tse-jira:score. Dry-run by default. Sprint-optional, multi-project, uses claude.ai Atlassian MCP. Grounded in Redis CS Support team Confluence standards.
